# Refine Aesthetics & Skin Clinic

> Advanced aesthetics, medical-grade skincare and semi-permanent cosmetics in West Kirby, Wirral — delivered by qualified practitioner Samantha Casey.

## About

Refine Aesthetics & Skin Clinic is an advanced aesthetics and medical-grade skincare clinic based at 56 Grange Road, West Kirby, Wirral, CH48 4EG. All treatments are performed by Samantha Casey, a BSc (Hons) Chemist, qualified Advanced Aesthetics Practitioner and SPMU Educator with over 10 years of experience. The clinic is located inside LUXE Supersalon on Grange Road, West Kirby.

## Services

- Anti-Wrinkle Injections (botulinum toxin for forehead, frown lines, crow's feet)
- Dermal Filler (hyaluronic acid for lips, cheeks, jawline, chin, tear troughs)
- Injectable Skin Boosters — Profhilo, Polynucleotides, Seventy Hyal
- Semi-Permanent Makeup (brows, eyes, lips — by a qualified SPMU Educator)
- Plasma Skin Tightening (non-surgical lift for eyes, brow, jowls, neck)
- Microneedling (EXCEED Precision with optional skin boosters and Exosomes)
- Wellness Injections (B12, Biotin, NAD+)
- Fat Dissolve & RF Tightening
- Advanced Facials & Chemical Peels
- Dermalux LED Facials
- DMK Enzyme Therapy
- BioRePeel Chemical Peel
